title: Unified customer dashboard
description: As a portfolio manager I want a unified dashboard so that I can see project health in one view
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows schedule, cost, and risk metrics; data refreshes daily; access controlled by role

title: Guided intake form
description: As a requestor I want a guided intake form so that submissions are complete and consistent
acceptance_criteria: Form validates required fields; schema stored; confirmation sent

title: Variance reporting
description: As a PMO analyst I want variance reports so that I can identify schedule and cost drift
acceptance_criteria: Variance report includes baseline vs actual; includes corrective actions; shared weekly

title: Release checklist automation
description: As a release manager I want a readiness checklist so that go-live criteria are verified
acceptance_criteria: Checklist includes security, QA, and rollback; approvals recorded

title: Change request workflow
description: As a change manager I want a change request workflow so that impacts are assessed before approval
acceptance_criteria: Change request captures scope, cost, and schedule impacts; approvals tracked
